message:
fix(bench): eliminate hardcoded /tmp path and PID collision risk in workload descriptor

Replace the hardcoded NATIVE_RUNTIME_DESCRIPTOR_PATH constant at
/tmp/pi_agent_rust_native_bench_descriptor.native.json with a
per-process unique path using std::env::temp_dir() and std::process::id().

Previously, multiple concurrent benchmark processes would race on the
same file path, potentially causing one process to read a partially-
written descriptor from another. The new path format
(pi_agent_rust_native_bench_descriptor_{pid}.native.json) ensures each
process writes to its own file, eliminating the race condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
